Third-party licensing notice for vendored sources.

Source packages:
- indicators (https://github.com/p-ranav/indicators), tag v2.3,
  commit 26d39ad8fb438f5f50fb16427f554045d8431030
- tabulate (https://github.com/p-ranav/tabulate)

License files included in this directory:
- indicators-MIT.txt
- indicators-termcolor-BSD.txt
- tabulate-MIT.txt
- termcolor-BSD.txt
- boost-software-license-1.0.txt

Mapping:
- Most files under third_party/include/indicators are from indicators and are MIT-licensed.
- third_party/include/indicators/termcolor.hpp references termcolor and BSD license.
- Most files under third_party/include/tabulate are from tabulate and are MIT-licensed.
- third_party/include/tabulate/termcolor.hpp references termcolor and BSD license.
- third_party/include/tabulate/optional_lite.hpp,
  third_party/include/tabulate/string_view_lite.hpp,
  third_party/include/tabulate/variant_lite.hpp
  are from Martin Moene "lite" libraries under Boost Software License 1.0.
- Files under third_party/target_install_package are a vendored install tree from
  target_install_package.cmake, are MIT-licensed, and carry their upstream
  LICENSE file in that vendored tree.
